sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94231" key="sindonufh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σινδονῠφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n94231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woven like</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σινδών</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42</biblScope> </bibl>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Σιδονυφής</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
